html:
The Rabbit Earmuffs are a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. They require 2 Rabbits and 1 Twigs to craft. Beardlings are an acceptable substitute to be used as Rabbits in the crafting recipe. A Sewing Kit repairs it to full durability.

It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60.

The Rabbit Earmuffs can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.

With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Rabbit Earmuffs will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Winter.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Fluffy Deermuffs skin was introduced during the official Winter's Feast event in 2019.
Woven - Elegant
Marrymaker Collection
Fluffy Deermuffs
An earmuff of deer fluff.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Sweet Beemuffs
Stay warm, honey!

Trivia

  • The Rabbit Earmuffs were added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • While the Earmuffs do not prevent the Bearger's yawn from putting the player to sleep in Don't Starve Together, they will prevent the Queen Womant from stunning the player with her tuba attack.

Assets

"earmuffshat"
“At least my ears won't get cold...”
–Wilson
“Smells like rabbit butt.”
–Willow
“Now I look like little bunny!”
–Wolfgang
“Their bitter end protects me from the bitter cold.”
–Wendy
“I WILL UTILIZE THEIR FURRINESS”
–WX-78
“Poor Leporidae. At least my ears will be warm.”
–Wickerbottom
“Where I'm from these would only work in the fall.”
–Woodie
“They're warm, at least.”
–Maxwell
“Keeps in thermal waves. Keeps out sound waves.”
–Wagstaff
“Yes, möst practical!”
–Wigfrid
“Strap some rabbits to our head, good idea.”
–Webber
“Keeps my ears fluffy and warm.”
–Walani
“Ahh, fuzzy!”
–Warly
“Thet hat be makin' squeakin' sounds.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS STYLISH HAT”
–Wilba
“Squee Hopper ears”
–Wormwood
“The rabbits whisper their secrets to me.”
–Wheeler
“I hate cold weather.”
–Winona
“They weren't made for floppy ears.”
–Wortox
“Keep cute webby ears warm.”
–Wurt
“Some of us don't have ear fluff of our own, Woby.”
–Walter
“If the rest of me freezes, at least my ears will be cozy.”
–Wanda
The Rabbit Earmuffs are a Hat Item found in the Clothing Filter and Winter Items Filter. They require 2 Rabbits and 1 Twigs to craft. Beardlings are an acceptable substitute to be used as Rabbits in the crafting recipe. A Sewing Kit repairs it to full durability.
It is a tier 1 warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. It has an insulation factor of 60.
The Rabbit Earmuffs can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn.
With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Rabbit Earmuffs will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Winter.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bịt Tai Thỏ là một Vật Phẩm Mũ được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Quần Áo và Bộ Lọc Vật Phẩm Mùa Đông. Chúng cần 2 Thỏ và 1 Cành Cây để chế tạo. Râu là một vật thay thế có thể chấp nhận được để sử dụng làm Thỏ trong công thức chế tạo. Bộ dụng cụ may vá sẽ sửa chữa nó để đạt được độ bền tối đa.

At least my ears will be warm. |woodie = Where I'm from these would only work in the fall. |maxwell = They're warm, at least. |wagstaff = Keeps in thermal waves. Keeps out sound waves. |wigfrid = Yes, möst practical! |webber = Strap some rabbits to our head, good idea. |walani = Keeps my ears fluffy and warm. |warly = Ahh, fuzzy! |woodlegs = Thet hat be makin' squeakin' sounds. |wilba = 'TIS STYLISH HAT |wormwood = Squee Hopper ears |wheeler = The rabbits whisper their secrets to me. |winona = I hate cold weather. |wortox = They weren't made for floppy ears. |wurt = Keep cute webby ears warm. |walter = Some of us don't have ear fluff of our own, Woby. |wanda = If the rest of me freezes, at least my ears will be cozy. |choose = wx78}} The '''Rabbit Earmuffs''' are a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] found in the [[Clothing Filter]] and [[Winter Items Filter]]. They require 2 [[Rabbit]]s and 1 [[Twigs]] to craft. Beardlings are an acceptable substitute to be used as Rabbits in the crafting recipe. A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs it to full durability. It is a ''tier 1'' warm clothing, increasing the time a character can be without a [[Fire|fire]] during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. It has an [[Freezing#Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 60. The Rabbit Earmuffs can be given to a [[Pig]] or [[Bunnyman]] to wear, which provides no effect. It will still lose durability while worn. With the '''Seasonal Starting Items''' default preset, the Rabbit Earmuffs will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during [[Winter]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Fluffy Deermuffs''' skin was introduced during the official [[Winter's Feast]] event in 2019.
